name: willink-claude-kit
description: i-Willink 標準開発エージェント基盤を Codex でも使うための plugin。Claude Code 版を正本にし、Codex 向け adapter skill と同期チェックを提供する。

interface.shortDescription: i-Willink standard development workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Runs i-Willink's development standards and 5 phase build workflow in Codex while keeping Claude Code plugin files as the canonical source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo with i-Willink standards.
Plan this change using the 5 phase flow.
